hulk.image: Transform this cat into a muscular green Hulk version of itself. Keep the same green eyes, same fluffy long hair texture. Massive green muscular body bulging with strength, angry roaring expression showing sharp teeth, torn purple shorts, standing upright on two legs with clenched fists, destroyed city street background with smoke and rubble, dramatic cinematic lighting, highly detailed movie poster photorealistic.
hulk.video: A muscular green Hulk cat flexes bulging arms and roars angrily, torn purple shorts, dust and smoke swirl around him, camera slowly pushes in for epic cinematic hero shot, slow motion, dramatic rubble background.

ironman.image: Transform this cat into Iron Man version of itself. Keep the same green eyes visible through the helmet visor. Iconic red and gold Iron Man armored suit, glowing blue arc reactor chest piece, sleek metallic helmet with feline ear shapes, heroic standing pose with one repulsor beam charging. Dramatic cinematic lighting, Stark Tower city skyline sunset background, highly detailed photorealistic movie poster composition.
ironman.video: Iron Man cat charges repulsor beam, blue glow intensifies from gauntlet, armored suit reflects sunset light, subtle hovering motion, camera circles slowly for epic cinematic hero reveal, dust particles drift.

batman.image: Transform this cat into Batman version of itself. Keep the same green eyes and fluffy fur pattern. Dark grey tactical Batsuit with black cape billowing, iconic yellow utility belt, black pointed bat cowl mask with feline ears, brooding heroic pose standing on a gotham city rooftop at night, rainy dramatic atmospheric lighting with lightning in distance, photorealistic cinematic composition.
batman.video: Batman cat stands brooding on Gotham rooftop at night, black cape billows dramatically in the wind, rain falls around him, lightning flashes in the distance illuminating skyline, camera slowly pushes in for cinematic hero shot.

thor.image: Transform this cat into Thor version of itself. Keep the same green eyes and long fluffy hair. Norse god warrior outfit with silver and red armor, flowing red cape, thunderous Mjolnir hammer held aloft sending lightning into stormy sky, long flowing golden mane, muscular heroic standing pose on asgardian rocky cliff, epic stormy clouds with lightning, cinematic dramatic lighting, photorealistic.
thor.video: Thor cat raises Mjolnir high as lightning crackles from the hammer into stormy sky, red cape billows in the wind, long mane flows, dramatic storm clouds swirl, camera slowly pushes in for epic cinematic hero shot.

superman.image: Transform this cat into a Superman version of itself. Keep the same tortoiseshell brown and black fur, same green eyes, same fluffy long hair. Iconic Superman costume: blue bodysuit with the red and yellow S shield emblem on the chest, red flowing cape, red boots, yellow belt. Heroic upright standing pose on two legs, chest puffed out proudly. Dramatic backlight sunset, dust motes, epic city skyline background, cinematic movie poster composition, highly detailed photorealistic.
superman.video: A heroic Superman cat stands confidently, red cape billows and ripples dramatically in the wind behind him, fluffy fur gently moves, green eyes blink with determination, chest puffs out proudly, warm sunset light streams past, dust particles drift, camera slowly pushes in for epic cinematic hero shot.

gangster.image: Transform this cat into a dapper gangster boss version of itself. Keep the same fur pattern and green eyes. Pinstripe three-piece suit, black tie, fedora hat, cigar in mouth, vintage office background with leather chair and desk with stacks of papers, warm moody lighting, film noir style, highly detailed photorealistic.
gangster.video: The gangster cat slowly exhales smoke from its cigar, tilts head slightly, warm office light flickers, curtain sways subtly in breeze, cinematic film noir atmosphere, camera slowly pushes in.

wizard.image: Transform this cat into a Harry Potter style magic student version of itself. Keep the same fur pattern and green eyes. Black wizard robe with red and gold Gryffindor tie and scarf, round tortoiseshell glasses, wand in paw, sitting at wooden desk in a grand magical library with floating candles and towering bookshelves, warm candlelight, photorealistic cinematic composition.
wizard.video: The wizard cat gently waves its wand, magical golden sparkles drift through the air, floating candles flicker, pages of an old book turn by themselves, warm candlelight plays across silky fur, camera slowly pushes in.
